Why Clients Call

🛠️

Real work. Real results.

Strategic Painting Pros LLC handles painting, surface prep, exterior cleaning, and property improvement work that helps spaces look sharper, cleaner, and more presentable. The goal is not to sound fancy. It is to leave the job looking right, whether it is a storefront repaint, a rental turn, a pergola build, or a property that needs a stronger finish.

Core Services

🎨

Interior Painting

Walls, ceilings, doors, trim, cabinets, fixtures, closets, stairwells, and full interior repaint work for homes, rentals, and small commercial spaces.

🏠

Exterior Painting

Exterior walls, siding, stucco, fascia, soffits, eaves, fences, gates, pergolas, decks, stairs, and outdoor furniture with appearance and protection in mind.

💧

Surface Cleaning

Pressure washing, soft wash, driveways, sidewalks, patios, parking lots, storefront approaches, and exterior surface cleanup before paint or refresh work.

🧱

Texture Repair + Touch-Ups

Wall repair, texture blending, patch work, repainting, fixture-area touch-ups, and surface correction to help damaged areas finish cleaner.

🚧

Parking Lot Services

Seal coating, striping, thermoplastic markings, sweeping, curb painting, and lot refresh services that improve appearance and function.

🪚

Add-On Services

Light carpentry, deck and pergola work, stair repairs, tile work, small concrete work, masonry touch-ups, and related finish improvements.

Featured Work

Commercial Exterior

O’Reilly Auto Parts

Storefront repaint on the red facade panels. Strong example of commercial surface prep, exterior paint work, and a clean finished presentation.

BEFORE Dirty streaks, faded areas, and sign shadowing visible on the facade.

Surface Issues

Staining, fading, and exposed panel differences made the storefront look uneven and tired.

AFTER Clean red finish with a sharper storefront look and stronger visual impact.

Finished Result

Fresh red facade, cleaner presentation, and a commercial finish that reads better from the street.

Residential Carpentry

Custom Pergola Build

Real pergola project built from the design stage into a finished backyard structure. Good proof that the work goes beyond paint when the job calls for it.

BUILD Open patio area ready for a custom structure and outdoor upgrade.

Starting Point

Blank patio section with room for shade, structure, and a cleaner finished look.

FINISHED Dark pergola structure installed for shade, style, and stronger backyard presence.

Built Out

Solid frame, clean lines, and a more complete outdoor space that feels intentionally finished.
